0 - Claims and FFS not met

3 - Claims met and FFS

MULSCL_MEDICAID Multiple Sclerosis and Transverse Myelitis Indicator - Medicaid-Only Data NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering only Medicaid data, for having Multiple Sclerosis
